queries.question: For each nature reserve, show the species of flora and fauna that they have.
queries.sql: select nature_reserves.name , flora_and_fauna.speciesname from Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna join Flora_and_fauna on Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.FaunaId = Flora_and_fauna.FaunaID join Nature_Reserves on Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.NatureReserveId = Nature_Reserves.ReserveID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?speciesname WHERE {
  ?nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna a :Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna .
  ?flora_and_fauna a :Flora_and_fauna .
  ?nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna p:hasFlora_and_fauna ?flora_and_fauna .
  ?nature_reserves a :Nature_Reserves .
  ?nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna p:hasNature_Reserves ?nature_reserves .
  ?nature_reserves p:name ?name .
  ?flora_and_fauna p:SpeciesName ?speciesname .
}

queries.question: Which species of flora and fauna do all nature reserves have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Flora_and_fauna.SpeciesName  from Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna join Flora_and_fauna on Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.FaunaId = Flora_and_fauna.FaunaID join Nature_Reserves on Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.NatureReserveId = Nature_Reserves.ReserveID   GROUP BY Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.FaunaId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Nature_reserves_flora_and_fauna.NatureReserveId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Nature_Reserves)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the species of flora and fauna that every nature reserve has.
